calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2017 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Against Defendant Jgx, Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Against Defendant Jgx, Inc.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Continued To Mar-29-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Darwin (415-227-0900) of Buchalter Nemer for Plaintiff Handlery Hotels.
Camilo Artiga-Purcell (650-697-6000) of Cotchett, Pitre & McCarthy, LLP for Defendant JGX, Inc.

Hearing is held. The parties reached an agreement to continue the hearing to 3/29/17. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order Against Defendant JGX, Inc. is Continued to March 29, 2017 at 9:30am in Dept. 501. Points and Authorities due by 3/15/17, Opposition due by 3/22/17; reply waived. Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
